name: studio-mantovan-reels-animator
description: Remotion starter per Studio Mantovan – reel animati con dati clinici

scripts.render:split: npx remotion render src/index.ts SplitReelComposition out/reel-finale.mp4 --props=./props.json --codec=h264
scripts.render:overlay: npx remotion render src/index.ts ReelComposition out/reel-finale.mp4 --props=./props.json --codec=h264
